demos.label: Bootstrap
demos.caption: createApp state flow, fixed-step clock, seeded emitter, and click-to-reseed interaction.

demos.label: Minimal
demos.caption: Renderer, frame loop, pointer orbit, resize observer, and explicit disposal.

demos.label: Geometry
demos.caption: Extruded shapes, lathe surfaces, deformers, static merging, and layout helpers.

demos.label: Materials
demos.caption: PBR presets, toon ramps, matcap material, and material comparisons.

demos.label: Props
demos.caption: Reusable prop factories, composites, animation clips, and instanced props.

demos.label: Animation
demos.caption: Programmatic clips and createAnimationController crossfades.

demos.label: JSX layer
demos.caption: Hyperscript tree rendered by the reactive scene layer.

demos.label: Instancing
demos.caption: One-geometry InstancedMesh field with seeded placement.

demos.label: Batched
demos.caption: Varied geometries sharing one material through BatchedMesh.

demos.label: Procedural
demos.caption: Seeded forest scatter with Poisson disk sampling and noise terrain.

demos.label: Shader
demos.caption: Holographic ShaderMaterial with fresnel, scanlines, and animated opacity.

demos.label: Lighting
demos.caption: Environment, sun, and hemisphere fill toggles.

demos.label: Particles
demos.caption: Emitter shapes, lifetime curves, bursts, and gpu-emitter fallback.

demos.label: Isometric
demos.caption: Orthographic isometric camera and instanced props.

demos.label: Infinite iso
demos.caption: Endless heightmap terrain under an isometric camera.

demos.label: Follow cam
demos.caption: Framerate-independent third-person camera damping.

demos.label: Post FX
demos.caption: Composer chain with bloom, grade, and depth-sampling passes.

demos.label: Glitch
demos.caption: RGB shift, block displacement, and scan corruption passes.

demos.label: God rays
demos.caption: Screen-space light shafts from a projected light position.

demos.label: DOF + CA
demos.caption: Depth of field with chromatic aberration from a depth texture.

demos.label: Effects FX
demos.caption: Interactive WebGL composer and WebGPU/TSL effect playground.

demos.label: Voxels
demos.caption: VoxelChunk storage and greedy meshing terrain.

demos.label: Architecture
demos.caption: Scene modules, material pools, pick introspection, and cleanup ownership.

demos.label: Icaras Foundry
demos.caption: A complete stylized ship-forge scene with bloom, beams, particles, and blueprint mode.
